settings.heading: Most "South African" supplements aren't.
settings.body:
The local market is full of imported white-label capsules with a SA sticker. The doses are often too low to do what the research says they should. The labels hide ingredients behind "proprietary blends."

Vivid Health started because the team behind Onelife — three retail stores across Centurion, Glen Village, and Edenvale — kept being asked the same question: which one actually works? The honest answer was usually: none of these at this dose. So we built our own.
